contracts.project: Carrollton Heights NOTICE Drainage Improvements
contracts.notes: Design services for stormwater drainage improvements in the Carrollton Heights neighborhood, including piping across DART rail right-of-way to connect to Hutton Branch.

contracts.project: Perry Road and Country Club Drive Street Reconstruction Projects
contracts.limits: Perry Road from Walnut Avenue to Ryan Avenue; Country Club Drive from Josey Lane to Kelly Boulevard
contracts.notes: Engineering design services for street reconstruction including approximately 8,100 linear feet of concrete pavement, 16,000 linear feet of curb and sidewalks, 5,400 linear feet of water lines, 200 linear feet of gabion wall for streambank stabilization, and 600 linear feet of storm sewer pipe.

contracts.project: McInnish Park Concessions and Parking 2022 Project
contracts.notes: Engineering design services for construction plans including complete reconstruction of one parking lot, demolition of three existing restrooms/concession stands, and site work and foundations for two new pre-fabricated buildings and one shade structure.

contracts.project: Sandy Lake Service Center Parking Lot Project
contracts.notes: Engineering design services for the Sandy Lake Service Center parking lot project.

contracts.project: Northland Estates And Ridgecrest Addition Street Replacement Project
contracts.notes: Contract Amendment No. 3 for additional engineering design services on street replacement project in Northland Estates and Ridgecrest Addition.

contracts.project: Plano Parkway Park Improvements - Warmington Drive Widening and Culvert Extension
contracts.limits: 150' section of Warmington Drive
contracts.notes: Engineering design services for widening a 150-foot section of Warmington Drive to 31 feet and adding a sidewalk over a box culvert, including culvert extension design and continuous pedestrian pathway to the neighborhood park.

contracts.project: Neighborhood Park Project At Warmington Drive And Plano Parkway
contracts.notes: Contract Amendment No. 2 for additional engineering services related to neighborhood park design and development.

contracts.project: Downtown Streetscape Infill Project
contracts.notes: Professional Services Contract for Engineering Services related to the Downtown Streetscape Infill Project.

contracts.project: Localized Flooding Program - Phase 1
contracts.limits: Five sites (Rolling Oaks Dr/Rooney Ln, Lavaca Tr/Cheyenne Dr, Arbor Creek/Hebron Parkway, 1908 Oakbluff Drive, Rosemeade Parkway at Kelly Blvd)
contracts.notes: Engineering design services for phase 1 of the Localized Flooding Program to design solutions and provide bidding and construction administration services for five flood-prone drainage areas to mitigate future flooding risks.

contracts.project: 2023 Parks And Recreation Master Plan
contracts.notes: Master plan for parks and recreation facilities in Carrollton.

contracts.project: Nob Hill Section 2 Street Reconstruction Project
contracts.notes: Additional engineering services for street reconstruction project in the Nob Hill Section 2 area.

contracts.project: Dudley Branch Hike and Bike Trail Project - Contract Amendment No. 3
contracts.notes: Professional engineering services for the Dudley Branch Hike and Bike Trail Project. This contract amendment increases the revised total contract amount to $818,406.42.

contracts.project: Dudley Branch Drainage Improvements Project - Contract Amendment No. 2
contracts.notes: Professional services for the Dudley Branch Drainage Improvements Project. This contract amendment increases the revised total contract amount to $548,949.00.

contracts.project: Right-of-Way Acquisition and General Brokerage Services
contracts.notes: Right-of-way agent and licensed real estate broker services for right-of-way acquisition, business relocation, land acquisition, title services, and general brokerage services.

contracts.project: Engineering Services For Geotechnical And Material Testing
contracts.notes: Professional services contract for geotechnical and material testing services as part of a master services agreement with multiple qualified firms.

contracts.project: Underground Fuel Tank Removal and Replacement Project
contracts.limits: Multiple City facilities (Central Service Center, Police Department, Fire Station 7, Sandy Lake Service Center)
contracts.notes: Environmental engineering services for removal and replacement of two 12,000-gallon fuel tanks at the Central Service Center and fuel pump replacements at multiple City facilities. Includes permitting, reporting, and testing required by TCEQ.

contracts.project: EPA Lead and Copper Rule Revision Compliance Study
contracts.limits: Citywide water service line inventory, completion by October 16, 2024
contracts.notes: Engineering services for EPA Lead and Copper Rule Revision compliance including water service line material inventory in GIS format, field verification plan, public communication plan, and potential mobile application development and predictive modeling.

contracts.project: Frankford Road Reconstruction
contracts.limits: Frankford Road from IH-35E to Standridge Drive, approximately 13,200 linear feet of water line replacement and 1,800 linear feet of sewer line replacement
contracts.notes: Engineering design services for complete reconstruction of Frankford Road including pavement removal and replacement, water line replacement, sanitary sewer line replacement, sidewalk reconstruction, landscape and irrigation improvements, traffic analysis for possible lane reduction, and streetlight system evaluation.

contracts.project: Site Development Engineering Feasibility Study
contracts.limits: 121-acre City-owned property at Southwest Quadrant of President George Bush Turnpike and IH-35E
contracts.notes: Engineering services for site development feasibility study including reclamation and conceptual grading calculations, cost estimates for land preparation, geotech analysis, utility capacity analysis, topographic survey, and historical and endangered species review.

contracts.project: Capital Project Management Services
contracts.notes: General engineering consultant services for capital project management to support the Engineering Department's portfolio of approximately 53 capital projects in design, with focus on projects nearing completion and ready for construction in 2024.

contracts.project: Capital Project Management Services
contracts.notes: General engineering consultant services for capital project management to support the Engineering Department's portfolio of approximately 53 capital projects in design, with focus on projects nearing completion and ready for construction in 2024.

contracts.project: Hebron Elevated Storage Tank and Downtown Silos Painting Projects
contracts.notes: Professional design services, plan preparation, and construction phasing for repainting and repair of the Hebron water tower (built 1987) and refreshing the Downtown Carrollton grain silos mural, including lighting infrastructure research.

contracts.project: McInnish Synthetic Turf Project
contracts.notes: Engineering design services for the installation of synthetic turf on various fields at McInnish Sports Complex, including conversion of multi-purpose field #16 and potential infield conversions for baseball and softball.

contracts.company: Walter P. Moore and Associates, Inc.
contracts.project: Woodlake Lake and Josey Ranch Lake Dam Condition Assessment Study
contracts.notes: Detailed condition assessment of two City-owned dams to determine current condition and develop maintenance and capital improvement projects necessary to extend the lifespan and serviceability of both dams.

contracts.project: GIS Support Block
contracts.notes: Purchase of GIS support services through Texas DIR. Provides geographic information systems support services to the city.

contracts.project: Quiet Zone #3 Downtown Carrollton Project
contracts.limits: 10 locations along DGNO and BNSF rail lines in Downtown Carrollton
contracts.notes: Engineering design and plan preparation for quiet zones along rail lines in downtown Carrollton to reduce noise impacts from increased residential development. Services include survey and engineering design through final design and construction.

contracts.project: Hutton Branch - I35 to West Belt Line Erosion Repair Project
contracts.limits: Hutton Branch from I35 to West Belt Line Road, approximately 800 feet
contracts.notes: Engineering design services for erosion repair and stabilization of Hutton Branch channel, including removal of abandoned utility lines and protection of the W Belt Line Road bridge abutments to prevent structural damage and maintain roadway safety.

contracts.project: General Engineering Consultant Services - Project Management (Contract Amendment No. 1)
contracts.limits: Multiple vertical construction projects including City Jail Upgrades, Fire Station 5/South Service Center, Oak Creek Tennis Center, and City Hall Phase 2
contracts.notes: Contract amendment for additional project management services focused on vertical construction projects. This expands the original contract from horizontal construction project oversight to include vertical construction project management.

contracts.project: Localized Drainage Project Program Phase 1 (Contract Change Amendment No. 1)
contracts.limits: Dentonshire Drive drainage system
contracts.notes: Design amendment for drainage infrastructure improvements including street capacity analysis, receiving stream analysis, and construction documents for Dentonshire Drive drainage system improvements to alleviate flooding.

contracts.project: Hutton Branch - I35 to West Belt Line Erosion Repair Project
contracts.limits: Hutton Branch from I35 to West Belt Line Road, approximately 800 feet
contracts.notes: Engineering design services for erosion repair and stabilization of Hutton Branch channel, including removal of abandoned utility lines and protection of the W Belt Line Road bridge abutments to prevent structural damage and maintain roadway safety.

contracts.project: General Engineering Consultant Services - Project Management
contracts.notes: Contract amendment for general engineering consultant services related to project management, increasing total contract to $762,500.

contracts.project: Localized Drainage Project Program Phase 1
contracts.notes: Contract amendment for localized drainage project program phase 1, increasing total project contract to $1,137,742.

contracts.project: General Engineering Consultant Services Related to Project Management - Contract Amendment No. 2
contracts.notes: Contract amendment providing an additional project manager focused on vertical construction projects and extending availability of initial project manager to full time. Services include oversight of construction projects including City Jail Upgrades, Fire Station 5/South Service Center Construction, Oak Creek Tennis Center Improvements, and City Hall Phase 2.

contracts.project: Windmill Hill Street Reconstruction Project
contracts.limits: Windmill Hill Subdivision
contracts.notes: Additional professional engineering design services for street reconstruction in the Windmill Hill Subdivision, including design modifications to maintain existing 27 ft street width instead of widening to 31 ft standard.

contracts.project: Parks and Recreation Master Plan
contracts.notes: Contract amendment for increased scope of services related to the Parks and Recreation Master Plan, increasing total compensation.

contracts.project: Windmill Hill Street Reconstruction Project
contracts.limits: Windmill Hill Subdivision
contracts.notes: Additional professional engineering design services for street reconstruction in the Windmill Hill Subdivision, including design modifications to maintain existing 27 ft street width instead of widening to 31 ft standard.

contracts.project: Windmill Hill Street Reconstruction Project
contracts.limits: Windmill Hill Street
contracts.notes: Contract amendment for additional professional engineering services on the Windmill Hill Street reconstruction project.

contracts.project: Dudley Branch Channel Improvements Project
contracts.limits: Dudley Branch between Taos Pond and DART railroad tracks, including Eisenhower Street Culvert
contracts.notes: Contract amendment for additional drainage engineering services to evaluate the Eisenhower Street culvert crossing and determine if culverts are adequately sized, plus assess impacts of Elm Fork backwater through the area for various storm events.

contracts.project: Hebron Parkway (Hamilton To Meadow) Reconstruction Project
contracts.limits: Hamilton to Meadow
contracts.notes: CORRECTED amount (was hallucinated $2,050,861.50). Real = $6,486,733 total − $2,385,010 Huitt − $2,018,000 Halff = $2,083,723 Garver residual. Engineering design services for the reconstruction of Hebron Parkway between Hamilton and Meadow intersections. [Split 1/3 — approximate equal split from combined $6.49M award]

contracts.project: Hebron Parkway (Hamilton To Meadow) Reconstruction Project
contracts.limits: Hamilton to Meadow
contracts.notes: CONFIRMED amount per Dec 2025 Amendment Resolution. Engineering design services for the reconstruction of Hebron Parkway between Hamilton and Meadow intersections. [Split 2/3 — approximate equal split from combined $6.49M award]

contracts.project: Hebron Parkway (Hamilton To Meadow) Reconstruction Project
contracts.limits: Hamilton to Meadow
contracts.notes: CONFIRMED amount per Halff internal records (was hallucinated $2,050,861.50). Engineering design services for the reconstruction of Hebron Parkway between Hamilton and Meadow intersections. [Split 3/3 — approximate equal split from combined $6.49M award]

contracts.project: Railway Projects
contracts.notes: Professional engineering services for review and preparation of plans and documents related to railway projects.

contracts.project: Trinity Mills Road LED Street Lighting Design
contracts.limits: Trinity Mills Road from Marsh Lane to Midway Road
contracts.notes: Professional engineering design services for LED street lighting installation along Trinity Mills Road, an arterial entry point into the City of Carrollton.

contracts.project: Oak Creek Tennis Center Addition Project
contracts.notes: Architectural and engineering services for the design and construction administration of an addition to the Oak Creek Tennis Center, including four additional tennis courts, eight new pickleball courts, expansion of the pro shop building, parking lot expansion, and site amenities.

contracts.project: Oak Creek Tennis Center Addition Project
contracts.notes: Architectural and engineering services for the design and construction administration of an addition to the Oak Creek Tennis Center, including four additional tennis courts, eight new pickleball courts, expansion of the pro shop building, parking lot expansion, and site amenities.

contracts.project: Storm Damage Assessment and Evaluation
contracts.notes: Professional engineering services to assess storm damage to City facilities and draft reports to submit insurance claims.

contracts.project: Stormwater Utility Implementation Study
contracts.notes: Consultant services for stormwater utility implementation study through an interlocal agreement with the City of Celina.

contracts.project: Quiet Zone 3 Signal Design - Downtown Carrollton
contracts.limits: 7 railroad crossing locations
contracts.notes: Engineering cost reimbursement agreement for signal design services at seven railroad crossing locations along the DGNO railway as part of the Quiet Zone 3 project in downtown Carrollton to reduce noise impacts.

contracts.project: Quiet Zone 3 Signal Design - Downtown Carrollton
contracts.limits: 3 railroad crossing locations
contracts.notes: Contract amendment for additional signal design engineering services at three BNSF railway crossing locations as part of the Quiet Zone 3 project in downtown Carrollton. Revised total contract amount is $615,000.00.

contracts.project: Intersection Safety and Operations Analysis - Old Denton at Trinity Mills and Josey at Trinity Mills
contracts.limits: Two intersections: Old Denton Rd at Trinity Mills Rd and Josey Ln at Trinity Mills Rd
contracts.notes: Engineering analysis including traffic study, signal timing improvements, and intersection safety recommendations for two high-traffic intersections experiencing congestion and elevated accident rates. Project will evaluate existing conditions and provide short-term signal timing improvements and long-term recommendations for physical improvements.

contracts.project: General Engineering Consultant Services - Project Management (Contract Amendment No. 3)
contracts.notes: Project management services for both vertical and horizontal construction projects. This is the third amendment to an ongoing professional services agreement.

contracts.project: EW Brake Neighborhood Rehabilitation Project
contracts.limits: 2,650 linear feet of alleys, 4,475 linear feet of roadway, 3,110 linear feet of water line, 465 linear feet of sewer line, 300 linear feet of storm drain
contracts.notes: Design and engineering services for roadway and utility rehabilitation including pavement reconstruction, water line replacement, sewer line replacement, and storm drain infrastructure reconstruction.

contracts.project: Josey Lane Screening Project
contracts.limits: 330 feet
contracts.notes: Design and engineering services for complete reconstruction of screening wall improvements along Josey Lane at Green Ridge Drive intersection, including structural and zero-scaping infrastructure.

contracts.project: Francis Perry Neighborhood Rehabilitation Project
contracts.limits: 6,105 linear feet of alleys, 6,800 linear feet of roadway, 3,740 linear feet of sidewalk, 600 linear feet of channel, 600 linear feet of storm drain
contracts.notes: Design and engineering services for roadway and utility rehabilitation including pavement reconstruction, sidewalk installation, concrete channel reconstruction, and storm drain infrastructure reconstruction.

contracts.project: District 35E Property Site Development Feasibility Study - Contract Amendment No. 2
contracts.notes: Engineering services for site development feasibility study including updated traffic impact study, additional development option analysis, and water system impact modeling for City-owned property near PGBT and I-35E intersection.

contracts.project: Hebron Parkway (Hamilton to Meadow) Segment 2 Reconstruction
contracts.limits: Hamilton to Meadow
contracts.notes: Design services for reconstruction of Hebron Parkway including finalization of drainage study and design of underground storm improvements to address flooding issues.

contracts.project: Country Club Drive Improvement Project
contracts.notes: Professional engineering services for railroad sidewalk construction plans and design review associated with the Country Club Drive Improvement Project.

contracts.project: T.C. Rice Regional Trail
contracts.limits: 1.3 miles
contracts.notes: Engineering design services for a 1.3-mile shared use regional trail beginning at north Carrollton City Limits with connection to regional trail in Lewisville and ending with a bridge across Trinity River north of Frankford Road.

contracts.project: Josey Lane and Parker Road Intersection Improvements
contracts.limits: Josey Lane and Parker Road intersection
contracts.notes: Engineering services for intersection improvements including ADA compliance modifications, signal upgrades, dual left turn bays in northbound and southbound directions, additional right turn bays, and grade improvements on the north leg of the intersection.
